The '''Krabbex''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Crustacean/Legends|crustacean]] that was native to the oceanic [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. It was characterized by its ten legs, dual mandibles in its mouth, two rows of spines running along its back, eighteen [[black]] eyes with four on its front, and grasping claws. Krabbex were often hunted by the [[Merman|Mermen]] of Mon Calamari. It was the subject of one of the dioramas within the [[Holographic Zoo of Extinct Animals]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] [[Foreign Intruder Defense Organism]] resembled a krabbex.<ref name="COTF">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>
